content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Thorough review of the failure reconciliation implementation across 8 modified/new Rust source files (~6000 lines of changes). The implementation is well-structured: failure_reconciliation.rs correctly records failures, counts attempts, decides retry vs NeedsOperator escalation, and handles idempotent replays. The daemon_loop.rs and cli/run.rs integration points properly delegate to the new handler. Controller state machine changes in controller.rs correctly add Blocked→Running and Blocked→Reconciling transitions for retry context. The stale-attempt guard in fs.rs (started_at mismatch rejection) and the new terminal_event_for_attempt in queries.rs are good correctness improvements. All 987 tests pass, clippy is clean with -D warnings, and formatting is correct. No real bugs, safety problems, or significant correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
